ddls:
CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "influencer_name" TEXT /* Name of the influencer */,
  "main_genre" TEXT /* Main genre of the influencer */,
  "active_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the influencer became active */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the influencer */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the influencer */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL of the influencer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "follower_name" TEXT /* Name of the follower */,
  "main_genre" TEXT /* Main genre of the follower */,
  "active_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the follower became active */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the follower */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the follower */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL of the follower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the music genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the music genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_genre" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "influence_level" INTEGER /* Level of influence of the influencer on the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follower_genre" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "interest_level" INTEGER /* Level of interest of the follower in the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_follower" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the follower started following the influencer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id", "follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., album release, concert, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follower_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., attending a concert, buying an album, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_evolution" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution event */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the evolution event */,
  "evolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the evolution */,
  "evolution_type" TEXT /* Type of the evolution (e.g., growth, decline, merge, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact event */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_level" INTEGER /* Level of the impact (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follower_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "engagement_description" TEXT /* Description of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of the engagement (e.g., attending a concert, buying merchandise, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of the trend (e.g., growth, decline, stability, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follower_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "review_description" TEXT /* Description of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the follower (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)
